notes_update: VMID 303 (k3s-master02) has been fixed and is now at .192. Only VMID 306 (k3s-master03) remains.
title: Fix k3s-master03 IP Address via Proxmox Console
description: Configure k3s-master03 (VMID 306) to use IP address 10.88.145.196. The VM is running but not accessible via SSH. Requires Proxmox console access to configure netplan.

current_state.issue: VM running but not reachable via SSH - needs console access

requirements: Ability to use noVNC console interface

steps.details: Navigate to https://10.88.145.164:8006, locate VM 306 (k3s-master03), open Console
Login with credentials k3s/toor via console
Run: hostname && ip addr show ens18 | grep 'inet 10'
From external host, verify: ssh k3s@10.88.145.196 'hostname' returns 'k3s-master03'

success_criteria: ip addr shows 10.88.145.196/24 on ens18 interface
scripts: fix-master03-ip.py (for automated fix if SSH is accessible)
next_steps_after_completion: Join k3s-master02 and k3s-master03 to cluster
notes: This task requires console access which may not be available to all Cortex instances. If the assigned instance cannot access Proxmox console, task should be escalated or reassigned to an instance with appropriate access.
